name: ui-design
description: Opinionated per-platform UI design, review, and facelift subagents — one expert per surface. ui-web (WCAG 2.2 AA / WAI-ARIA / semantic HTML, framework-agnostic), ui-gnome (GNOME HIG + libadwaita, adaptive GTK4), ui-macos (Apple HIG + SwiftUI/AppKit, menu-bar-first), ui-windows (Fluent 2 + WinUI 3/WPF), and ui-garmin (Garmin Connect IQ / Monkey C watch faces, data fields, widgets, glances — power-budget- and device-matrix-aware). Each runs a surface-detection → design-review → facelift / greenfield / accessibility protocol and cites its platform guidelines by name. Android UI lives in the android-dev plugin (android-dev:ui-android).
